manufacturers.name: Jinhua Qidian Vehicle Co., Ltd. (Cheerd Bike)
manufacturers.products: Full suspension electric dirt bike / e-motorcycle — 72V 3000W Bafang mid-motor, 85–100km/h top speed, 72V30AH lithium battery, hydraulic disc brakes, 19" Kenda tires, 6061 aluminum frame
manufacturers.notes: 4 yr Gold Supplier. Model QD-EMB20. Brand: Qidian. Lead time: 15 days (1–2 units). Full OEM/ODM customization available. Bafang components are high-quality European-favored brand.

manufacturers.name: Changzhou Fubo Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
manufacturers.products: EEC/COC certified electric motorcycle — 8000W, 120km/h max speed, 72V 117AH lithium battery, dual-channel ABS, 255km range, cruiser style
manufacturers.notes: 9 yr Gold Supplier — very established. Model JSQ1. Brand: Fubo. EEC & COC certified (EU road legal). Lead time: 25 days. Logo/packaging customization from 50 units. ABS brakes are a strong safety differentiator.

manufacturers.name: Foshan Xinderui Trading Co., Ltd. (Racceway / RSA)

manufacturers.notes: 6 yr Gold Supplier. Model: Storm. Brand: RSA. ⚠️ Trading company (not direct factory) — negotiate on price. Lead time: 60 days (10+ units). Rating: 4.3/5 (3 reviews). Available in 5–12kW variants.

manufacturers.name: Qingdao Sunlit International Trade Co., Ltd.

manufacturers.notes: 1 yr Gold Supplier. Brand: Sunlit. 2-year warranty + online technical support. Lead time: 35 days (1–5 sets). Full customization (color, layout, materials). Anti-seismic certification is a valuable feature for Andorra terrain.
